claim: Sacred Tongue triangulated code training (KO/CA/DR) reduces loss by 31% compared to L3-only baseline at matched compute budget on T4 GPU. Crossover occurs at step 5 -- triangulated is better from nearly the start with proper GPU training.

prior_results.chat_14pct: Multi-view L0-L3 beat L3-only by 14% on Kaggle CPU (150 steps)
prior_results.code_local_cpu_1.85pct: Local CPU at 50 steps showed only 1.85% -- insufficient steps for crossover
prior_results.code_colab_t4_31pct: This run. 150 steps on T4 shows 31% improvement.

next_steps: Ablation: L0+L3, L1+L3, L2+L3 to isolate which layer contributes most
Cross-task generalization: does code-trained model help on chat or vice versa?
Run same experiment on Kaggle with GPU detection (P100 fallback mode)
